home.heading: Baduk, a quiet contest
home.sectionEmpty: No games yet. Start your first.

hero.heading1: A game, a piece of literature.
hero.sub1: 18-kyu through 7-dan, modeled on real human play. KataGo's Human-SL network is your opponent.
hero.sub2: Lee Chang-ho's endgame, Cho Chikun's fighting, Shin Jinseo's balance — pick from 18 masters across 7 styles.
hero.heading3: Read the universe in a single stone.
hero.sub3: Live winrate, score lead, dame-fill detection, auto dead-stone scoring — quiet but deep positional judgment.
hero.heading4: Silence on the board, calculation in the mind.
hero.sub4: Korean rules, half-point komi, auto dead-stone marking. KataGo reads the weight of every move with you.
hero.sub5: Rank-specific human models plus per-master styles — today, pick the opponent that suits your mood.

home.valueDesc1: Not a labeled difficulty — an actual Human-SL network trained on real games at that rank, 18-kyu to 7-dan.
home.valueDesc2: Seven play styles and 18 historic masters — Lee Chang-ho, Cho Chikun, Shin Jinseo, Ke Jie, and more.
home.valueDesc3: Live winrate and score lead, endgame-phase detection, and KataGo-ownership-driven dead-stone scoring.
home.scrollHint: Enter a nickname below to begin
home.footerNote: Your nickname lives only in a session cookie — clearing the browser forgets it.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Baduk takes your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, how long we keep it, and the rights you have over it.

collect.title: Data we collect
items: Nickname (up to 32 characters) and a normalised nickname key (used for uniqueness checks only)
Game history: board size, handicap, your colour, scores, win/loss, move sequence (kifu), start and end times
Session token (HttpOnly cookie, opaque random value — not a JWT)
Connection time and last-activity time (auto-purged after 1 hour of inactivity)
Server logs: IP address (rate-limiting and abuse prevention only), request path, response time — auto-deleted within 14 days
What we do NOT collect: email, phone number, payment details, location, device identifiers, profile photo

purpose.title: How we use it
items: To provide game play and display your game history
To check nickname uniqueness (nickname_key field)
To prevent abuse and maintain rate limits
For aggregated, anonymised service statistics (daily active users, average game length, etc.)

retention.title: Retention
items: Session token: discarded after 1 hour of inactivity or on explicit logout
Game history: kept with a nickname snapshot; deleted on user request (see rights below)
Server logs: auto-deleted 14 days after collection

thirdParty.title: Third-party sharing and processors
items: We do not share or transfer your data to any third party.
External services used: Pretendard font CDN (jsdelivr.net), KataGo model download (media.katagotraining.org). No personally identifiable information is transmitted.

rights.title: Your rights
items: Access, correction, or deletion requests: support@baduk.example
Nickname change: create a new nickname session
Game history deletion: email the address above with your nickname — processed within 7 business days

minors.title: Minors under 14 (Korean Network Act)
items: Users under 14 years of age must have a legal guardian's consent before using the service.
By registering a nickname you confirm that you are 14 or older.
If guardian consent is required, please contact support@baduk.example.

cookies.title: Cookies
items: We use exactly one cookie: the session token (HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax; Secure in production).
No analytics, advertising, or tracking cookies of any kind.

changes.title: Policy changes
items: Material changes will be announced on this page at least one week before taking effect.
The last-updated date at the bottom of this page reflects the current version.

contact.title: Privacy contact
items: Email: support@baduk.example

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Baduk service and set out the rights and obligations of the operator and users.

intro.title: About the service
items: 'Baduk' is a free web and mobile service for playing Go against the KataGo Human-SL model.
Twelve strength levels are available — 18-kyu through 7-dan — with even games and 2–9 stone handicaps.
Three board sizes are supported: 9×9, 13×13, and 19×19.

account.title: Account (nickname session)
items: No email or password registration is required — a nickname alone creates a temporary session.
Sessions expire automatically after 1 hour of inactivity.
If the same nickname is used in a new session, the new session replaces the existing one.

prohibited.title: Prohibited conduct
items: Automated bots or scripts that generate high request volumes
Impersonation nicknames or nicknames containing offensive or hateful language
Exploiting service vulnerabilities or deliberately overloading the infrastructure
Any other conduct that violates applicable law or seriously disrupts the service

aiDisclaimer.title: AI disclaimer
items: KataGo Human-SL is an AI model; its evaluations and hints are for reference only.
The AI's analysis does not guarantee correct play and is provided for educational and recreational purposes.

serviceChanges.title: Changes and interruptions
items: The operator may modify or discontinue features with prior notice.
Emergency maintenance may cause unannounced temporary outages.

ip.title: Intellectual property
items: The 'Baduk' name, design, and source code are owned by the operator.
KataGo is distributed under the MIT licence (source: https://github.com/lightvector/KataGo).
Kifu (SGF records) produced by users belong to those users and may be freely downloaded and shared.

jurisdiction.title: Governing law and disputes
items: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea.
Disputes will first be resolved through good-faith negotiation; unresolved matters will be referred to the court of jurisdiction at the operator's registered address.

contact.title: Contact
items: Email: support@baduk.example
